ddls:
CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user account */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the user */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Social media links of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "profile_updated_at" TEXT /* Profile updated at */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_logins" (
  "login_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user account */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "login_method" TEXT /* Login method used */,
  "login_status" TEXT /* Login status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("login_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user account */,
  "session_key" TEXT /* Session key for the user */,
  "session_data" TEXT /* Serialized session data */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the session expires */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Device information */,
  "session_updated_at" TEXT /* Session updated at */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of role assignment */,
  "assignment_updated_at" TEXT /* Assignment updated at */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission assignment */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission */,
  "permission_assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of permission assignment */,
  "permission_assignment_updated_at" TEXT /* Permission assignment updated at */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES user_permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user account */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the activity (e.g., login, logout, view, edit, delete) */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the activity */,
  "activity_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "activity_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser used for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_reset_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password reset request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user account */,
  "token" TEXT /* Token for the password reset request */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the token expires */,
  "is_used" INTEGER /* Indicates if the token has been used */,
  "request_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the password reset request was made */,
  "request_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser used for the password reset request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id")
)
